access_token.description: Zoho OAuth access token. Sent as the Authorization header with a 'Zoho-oauthtoken ' prefix; never logged.

base_url.description: Zoho Invoice API base URL override for tests or region-specific data centers.

organization_id.description: Optional Zoho Invoice organization ID; sent as the organization_id query parameter on every request when set.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
